text:
edwin       2007-09-06 04:50:54 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    comms                Makefile 
  Added files:
    comms/bluez-firmware Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-message 
                         pkg-plist 
  Log:
  New port: comms/bluez-firmware Firmware for the D-Link BCM2033 bluetooth
  
          Firmware for the Broadcom BCM2033 chip based Bluetooth USB
          devices. To be downloaded with bcmfw(1). The ubtbcmfw(4)
          and ng_ubt(4) kernel modules need to be installed.
  
  PR:             ports/115036
  Submitted by:   Dirk-Willem van Gulik <dirkx@joost.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.176     +1 -0      ports/comms/Makefile
  1.1       +22 -0     ports/comms/bluez-firmware/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/comms/bluez-firmware/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/comms/bluez-firmware/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +39 -0     ports/comms/bluez-firmware/pkg-message (new)
  1.1       +8 -0      ports/comms/bluez-firmware/pkg-plist (new)
